channel.title: Accountability on Fellowship of Business Leaders
channel.description: Recent content in Accountability on Fellowship of Business Leaders

item.title: The Hidden Risk in Leadership: Isolation at the Top
item.description: Isolation is the silent risk most leaders never talk about. From the outside, executive life looks powerful — influence, authority, control. But at the top, circles get smaller. Conversations get filtered. And the higher you climb, the fewer people you can speak honestly with.

item.title: Building Accountability, Not Affirmation
item.description: Most leaders surround themselves with people who affirm their decisions. The best leaders surround themselves with people who challenge them.
